title: Repository Stats History
description: Time-series of GitHub stars and forks for every tracked repository. Keyed by repository URL; each entry contains metadata and dated snapshots showing how popularity evolves over time.

RepoHistoryEntry.description: Historical star/fork data for a single repository.

snapshots.description: Chronologically ordered snapshots of repository metrics.

RepoHistoryEntry.title: RepoHistoryEntry

RepoMeta.description: Metadata identifying which paper/conference the repository belongs to.

title.description: Paper title associated with this repository.

RepoMeta.title: RepoMeta

RepoSnapshot.description: A single point-in-time measurement of repository popularity. GitHub repos have stars/forks; Zenodo records have views/downloads.

date.description: ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the measurement was taken.

stars.description: GitHub star count at this date.

forks.description: GitHub fork count at this date.

views.description: Zenodo view count at this date.

downloads.description: Zenodo download count at this date.

RepoSnapshot.title: RepoSnapshot
